case_title: MIGUEL ZEA CAMILO VS. IL MASSIMO DEL PANINO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMILO, MIGUEL ZEA AS TO DEFENDANT IL MASSIMO DEL PANINO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON KROCHIK, JEFF , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
